div.head: The Chairman of the American Delegation (Hull) to the Acting Secretary of State
div.p: 60. Twenty-one countries have now signed solidarity declaration.Declaration of the Principles of the Solidarity of America, approved December 24, 1938. Article Fifth states that “This Declaration shall be known as the ‘Declaration of Lima’;” see Report of the Delegation of the United States, p. 189. Text not yet released. Brazil desires to make some declarationRemarks by the Chairman of the Delegation of Brazil, December 24, 1938, Octava Conferencia Internacional Americana, Diario de Sesiones, p. 1041. in a manner not yet determined clarifying Brazilian position.

I will speak at plenary this afternoon about 6:15.Address of the Honorable Cordell Hull at the Plenary Session, December 24, 1938, Report of the Delegation of the United States, p. 102. Will cable text of my address for release on receipt of press association flash that I have begun speaking.
